title: aeschynanthus forbesii
intro: Aeschynanthus forbesii, also known as the Forbes' lip or the tropical lip orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the Gesneriaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus forbesii include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Aeschynanthus forbesii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal usage.
